name: news-weekly-markets
description: Generates a price-first WEEKLY MARKETS REPORT: computes each tracked instrument's deterministic week-over-week % move from GlobalPerspectiveMarkets HISTORY#, then grounds each mover in our own ECONOMIC_IMPACT coverage (DeepSeek note) or a clearly-labeled self-searching web context (Perplexity sonar), never fabricating a cause. Writes a draft for one-click human approval. See WEEKLY_MARKETS_PLAN.md.
